title: Lemonade Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Lemonade announced Q4 and full year 2024 financial results. In-force premium grew 26% to $944 million. Customer count increased 20% to 2.4 million. Gross profit doubled year-over-year to $167 million. Net loss $30 million ($0.42 per share). Gross loss ratio 63%, improvement from 77% prior year. Cash flow positive year achieved: $48 million adjusted free cash flow, year ahead of expectations. First EBITDA positive quarter excluding growth spend in Q4. 2025 guidance: In-force premium growth 28%, approaching 30% cruising velocity. Adjusted EBITDA loss $135-140 million for year. California wildfire impact $45 million gross, $20 million net after reinsurance. Auto insurance expansion across eight states. Management executing on profitability path with goal EBITDA positive end 2025/early 2026, GAAP profitability roughly year later.
